articles.title: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say

articles.title: Diamond giant De Beers halts work at flagship South African mine as demand plummets
articles.summary: Production will stop for two years at the mine which employs more than 4,000 people.

articles.title: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal
articles.summary: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".

articles.title: Bangkok fire investigation finds locked doors and flammable decor as deaths climb to 30
articles.summary: Survivors and first responders reported locked doors and a lack of signage marking emergency exits.

articles.title: Singapore court orders Bloomberg to pay $356,000 to ministers in defamation case
articles.summary: The ministers claimed the piece, which cited their luxury bungalow deals, had tarnished their reputation.

articles.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
articles.summary: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.

articles.title: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
articles.summary: The judge said the suit was brought for 'improper purposes' and referred a Trump attorney for possible disciplinary action.

articles.title: Yemen's Houthis launch missiles at Saudi Arabia after strikes on Sanaa airport
